item.title: KiMu's AutoMate Kit
item.description: KiMu's Automate Kit - First step towards robotics - Build Programmable Robot toys without coding and play with remote control in the Automate App - Perfect robot building kit for beginners, Ideal gift for kids, User friendly, Value for money. Make 100+ STEM projects with controller unit, sensors, electronic modules, actuators available in the kit. Learn Robotics while having fun.

item.title: FAQs on Automate Kit
item.description: Automate Kit Projects FAQs on Automate App, IR sensor, PIR sensor, Sound sensor, Temperature sensor, Calibration, Voltage Input, Digital Input, Digital Output, Control Unit, Automate App settings, Limit Switch, Relay Switch, Debug Feature etc.,

item.title: Dump Truck
item.description: A dump truck is a vehicle that is utilized at construction sites to transport construction materials to and from the site. Dump Truck is one of the projects available in KiMu's Automate Kit. In this Project, user can perform the dump and return motions as well, in addition to the basic motions (forward, backward, left and right).

item.title: Light bulb on/off with remote/timer
item.description: In this project, with KiMu's Automate Kit, we are going to build a system using relay switch to turn on/off the light bulb at the specific time automatically or to turn on/off light bulb with remote control.

item.title: Excavator
item.description: Excavator is a heavy construction equipment, which is used mainly for digging purposes as well as various lifting and carrying tasks in various applications. Let us build a excavator robot with the KiMu's Advanced Automate Kit with the use of stepper motors which helps in contolling the excavator arms by a fixed amount of degrees.

item.title: Automatic Fan On/Off using NTC Sensor
item.description: Sometimes we do feel lazy to turn the fan on, when the conditions are hot and turn it off, when the conditions are cold. Wouldn't it be nice if there is an automated system which performs this task? With KiMu's Advanced Automate Kit, we are going to build a system to automatically turn on/off the fan based on the temperature using NTC Sensor. The project has wide range of applications like Cooling fans for laptops and computers, energy conservation applications.

item.title: Light bulb on/off with Light Sensor
item.description: In this project, with KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit, we are going to build a system using relay switch and light sensor to turn on/off the light bulb automatically based on the light conditions (Turn on light bulb if it is dark and turn it off if the surrounding has enough lighting).

item.title: Light bulb on/off with PIR sensor
item.description: In this project, with KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit, we are going to build a system using relay switch and PIR sensor to turn on/off the light bulb automatically based on the detection of motion.

item.title: Line Follower Robot
item.description: Line Follower Robot (LFR) is an intelligent guided robot that follows a line drawn on the ground to detect a dark line on a white surface. It helps in various applications, such as industrial automation, educational robotics, and entertainment. Let's get started and build a Line Follower Robot with KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit.

item.title: Obstacle Avoidance Robot with Fail Safe
item.description: What if the obstacle is not detected by the ultrasonic sensor?. Let us add a Fail Safe to the Obstacle Avoidance Robot by adding the limit switch, in such a way that Limit switch will be switched on, if it comes in contact with the obstacle.

item.title: Obstacle Avoidance Robot
item.description: An Obstacle Avoidance Robot is an autonomous robot, which can sense and overcome obstacles on its path. It uses Ultrasonic sensors to detect the obstacles on its path. Almost all navigation robot demands some sort of obstacle detection, hence Obstacle Avoidance Robot has a vast field of application. Let's build and program the Obstacle Avoidance Robot with KiMu's Automate Kit.

item.title: Light bulb on/off with Sound Sensor
item.description: In this project, with KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit, we are going to build a system using relay switch and sound sensor to turn on/off the light bulb automatically based on the sound.

item.title: Automatic plant watering
item.description: Watering is the most important practice and the most labour-intensive task in the daily operations related to farming/gardening. Let us automate watering by building a Automatic Plant Watering system with the use of KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit. This system uses moisture sensor to detect the moisture content in the soil and water the plants based on the moisture content.

item.title: Remote-Control Car
item.description: Making and building new things are always fun. Open the KiMu’s Automate kit, let’s have fun building a basic remote-control car from scratch. After assembling the car, children can control it to their heart's content by programming the different motions (Forward, Backward, Right, Left) with automate app.

item.title: Automatic Sanitizer Dispenser
item.description: Want to have a hygienic and safe environment around your house, let us build a automatic sanitizer dispenser with KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit that allows to sanitize the hands without making any contact. Whenever the distance sensor detects the object with in a certain distance, it automatically dispenses the sanitizer.

item.title: Tank Level Maintainer
item.description: With KiMu's Automate Advanced Kit, we are going to build a system to automatically maintain the water level in the tank. When the water level in the tank falls below a certain value, the pump will start automatically, transferring water to the tank from another reserve tank. A moisture sensor is utilized in this project to determine the water level.

item.title: Soccer Robot
item.description: If you love playing with robots around your house, then you will definitely love this one. This Robot can be operated with a remote control to play soccer by kicking the ball. Let's build the Soccer Robot and score goals like Messi, Ronaldo. Soccer Robot is one of the projects available in the KiMu's Automate Kit.

item.title: Products
item.description: KiMu's Learning and Educational Toy products are designed to impart Creative Thinking, Self-Confidence, Curiosity, Knowledge of future technologies among the children. Engage kids in technology with KiMu robot toy kits and nurture next generation of successful professionals. Empower the teachers in the school classroom with KiMu's STEM Education solutions.
